data.evidence: bash scripts/check.sh passed; python3 ../go-workflow-stack/cli/go.py template-check . --json ok=true
local working-copy smoke with GO_STACK pointing at missing path cloned stack and ran scripts/check.sh

RED: template contract failed while hosted workflow existed; commit-SHA bootstrap failed because git clone --branch cannot resolve a SHA. GREEN: local template test now proves setup_required, no workflow directory, matching pinned runtime, and immutable commit checkout. Full pairing verification follows after task state is moved from active to done.

Template contract test passed with setup_required, no hosted workflow, and full-SHA bootstrap; v0.3.0 version endpoint reports contract version 2. Full pairing verification follows after active task moves to done.

TDD RED: GO_STACK_REF=v9.9.9 overrode the project contract and bootstrap returned 0. GREEN: bootstrap rejects the override with exit 5; bash syntax check and temporary commit-SHA bootstrap self-test pass.
RED regression listed executable .go JSON/JSONL contracts. GREEN removes executable bits while preserving launchers/scripts; bash syntax and template commit-SHA bootstrap self-test pass.

Dry-run resolved annotated v0.3.2 to 194fca97041ed98b97d155606cc4a296af83e3e9; transactional apply recorded .go/updates rollback state and set 0.3.2/v0.3.2. Bash syntax, template self-test, contract validation, and diff check passed.

R-1: official dry-run/apply updated the template to required_stack_version 0.3.3 and stack_ref v0.3.3, resolving the public annotated tag exactly to 697f89baa8d43105a715b662c6f3b46d37ba8a4b. R-2: generated rollback record .go/updates/20260716T085634105634Z-v0.3.3-697f89baa8d4.json validates target=.go/project.json, v0.3.2 to v0.3.3 before/after values, exact resolved commit, and no absolute paths. R-3 pre-close proof: projected final-state clone passed scripts/check.sh, GO_REQUIRE_LIVE_HERMES=1 scripts/check-linux.sh, fresh clone contract tests, native Hermes doctor ready with prompt -z, and template-check ok=true, all using an exact public v0.3.3 clone with GO_STACK_ALLOW_DEV unset. Post-close gates must pass before commit. Initial devil review B findings were repaired.

R-1 complete: official stack update pins required_stack_version 0.3.4 and stack_ref v0.3.4; annotated release tag resolves to payload e3fc0adb352eeda9a69e04890486db1eb49482b7. R-2 complete: rollback record .go/updates/20260716T110629719219Z-v0.3.4-e3fc0adb352e.json preserves v0.3.3 to v0.3.4 before/after state, exact resolved commit, and no absolute paths. R-3 complete: projected final-state scripts/check.sh and GO_REQUIRE_LIVE_HERMES=1 scripts/check-linux.sh passed from fresh public v0.3.4 clones with GO_STACK_ALLOW_DEV unset; fresh uv package doctor ready=true, exact_ref=true, identity_source=pep610-vcs, development_override=false, Hermes path /home/viggo/.local/bin/hermes. Doctor sha256 e78032475872c8ab674ddd3580c6e2cdac69e4dffa7389dc08e055bfd0996995; direct_url sha256 31f139ce1c1b502f66a63410b0e36ae34ccc8c034391780a6e3efaae215307b5. R-4 complete: CHANGELOG documents the v0.3.4 pin and exact official-GitHub PEP 610 provenance; GitHub Actions unused. Fresh-eyes re-review verdict A.
